tvShow.name: Sugar
tvShow.overview: John Sugar is a dashing private eye navigating the dark corners of sunny LA. Though he sees only the good in humanity, Sugar is haunted by a secret too dangerous to expose.

episodes.name: Olivia
episodes.overview: After solving a case in Japan, private eye John Sugar returns to LA to help find a missing woman with ties to a Hollywood legend.

episodes.name: These People, These Places
episodes.overview: Sugar suspects Melanie's not telling the full story. Meanwhile, he and Ruby may not be the only ones looking into the mysterious body in Olivia's trunk.

episodes.name: Shibuya Crossing
episodes.overview: Melanie and Sugar get caught in a dicey situation—and make a new enemy. Sugar reunites with old friends, but he senses some are keeping secrets.

episodes.name: Starry-Eyed
episodes.overview: Sugar and Melanie track down Olivia's friend, who shares disturbing information about Davy and his family. Davy and Kenny dig into Sugar's past.

episodes.name: Boy in the Corner
episodes.overview: Melanie gets a surprise visit that unleashes Sugar's dark side. Ruby receives chilling guidance from a colleague. Davy makes a tragic decision.

episodes.name: Go Home
episodes.overview: Sugar thinks he's made a break in the case. When a double cross forces him to do the unthinkable, he turns to Melanie and Henry for help.

episodes.name: The Friends You Keep
episodes.overview: Sugar's fears for the safety of his friends lead him to a clandestine gathering where he learns a dangerous secret—and the truth about Olivia.

episodes.name: Farewell
episodes.overview: A shocking realization points Sugar toward a discovery that changes everything.

episodes.name: Home Away from Home
episodes.overview: Sugar takes on a new case: Tracking down the troubled brother of rising local boxer Danny Moon.

episodes.name: Downer Town
episodes.overview: The search for Ji sends Sugar into dangerous territory. Danny resorts to desperate measures.

episodes.name: Watch Face
episodes.overview: Danny gets a lead on Ji. Back at the Del, Sugar finds himself with a new admirer.

episodes.name: Off 15
episodes.overview: Sugar makes a powerful enemy and has a falling out with Charlotte. The race to find Ji is on.

episodes.name: Unknowns
episodes.overview: Vega isn't convinced his problem with Ji is solved. Sugar befriends someone in Pavich's inner circle.

episodes.name: Cautionary Tale
episodes.overview: Sugar wrestles with his fear of contamination. Vega forces Sugar to make an impossible choice.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Season two ushers in the return of Los Angeles' iconic private detective and film connoisseur, John Sugar, in a new case, tracking the troubled older brother of an up-and-coming local boxer, as his search for his beloved missing sister continues. As the investigation expands into a citywide conspiracy with sinister intentions, Sugar must reckon with himself to answer the question — how far will he go to do what's right?
